introSection: Familienachterbahn is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Erse Park Uetze in Uetze, Lower Saxony, Germany.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The train has a dragon design.

fullText:
Familienachterbahn is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Erse Park Uetze in Uetze, Lower Saxony, Germany.



Red track and yellow supports.

The train has a dragon design.
